text.en:
If your Army Faction is **ORKS**, once per battle, at the start of your Command phase, you can call a Waaagh!. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your army and:

■ Units from your army with this ability are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced.
■ Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models from your army with this ability.
■ Models from your army with this ability have a 5+ invulnerable save.
Each time an **ORKS** unit from your army disembarks from a **TRANSPORT**, until the end of the turn, you can re‐roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that **ORKS** unit.
**SPEED FREEKS** units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

At the start of your Command phase, select one **MONSTER**, **VEHICLE** or **CHARACTER** unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Prey:
  • ■ When a friendly **BEAST SNAGGA** unit declares a charge, If your Prey is within 12" of that unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do:
    • That **BEAST SNAGGA** unit can re-roll that **charge roll**.
    • That **BEAST SNAGGA** unit must end that **charge move engaged** with your Prey.
■ Each time a **BEAST SNAGGA** model from your army makes an attack that targets your Prey, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Each time a **MEK**, **ORKS WALKER** or **GROTS VEHICLE** unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, roll one D6. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the corresponding ability shown in the table below.

Alternatively, when such a unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can select one of the abilities above instead of rolling the D6. If you do, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability as well.

If a weapon equipped by a model from you army has the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability from multiple sources, each time you take a Hazardous test for that weapon, it is failed on a roll of a 1-3.

• Friendly Stormboyz units have Battleline.
  • When a friendly Boyz/Kommandos/Stormboyz unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.
text.de:
• Befreundete Düs'nspringa-Einheiten haben Linientruppen.
  • Wenn eine befreundete Boys-/Kommandos-/Düs’nspringa-Einheit eine Vorrücken-/Rückzugsbewegung ausführt, verhindert jene Bewegung nicht, dass jene Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
text.es:
• Las unidades Zoldadoz de Azalto amigas tienen Línea de batalla.
  • Cuando una unidad Chikoz/Orkomandoz/Zoldadoz de Azalto amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder, esto no le impide ser apta para iniciar acciones.
text.fr:
• Les unités de Chokboyz amies ont Ligne.
  • Quand une unité de Boyz/Kommandos/Chokboyz amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite, ce dernier ne l’empêche pas d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
text.it:
• Le unità di Razzaltatori amiche hanno Linea di Battaglia.
  • Quando un’unità di Ragazzi/Zabotatori/Razzaltatori amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento, tale movimento non impedisce a quell’unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
text.ja:
• 味方ストームボゥイ・ユニットはバトルラインを持つ。
  • 味方ボゥイ/コマンド/ストームボゥイ・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を行った場合でも、そのユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
text.ko:
• 아군 스톰보이즈 유닛에 전열을 부여합니다.
  • 아군 보이즈/코만도스/스톰보이즈 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 그 이동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 특수 행동 시작이 가능합니다.
text.zh:
• 己方风暴小子单位拥有战线关键词。
  • 当一个己方蛮人小子/蛮人特种兵/风暴小子单位被选择进行一次突进/后撤移动时，那次移动不会阻止该单位开始一次行动。

text.en: Melee weapons equipped by **ORKS** models from your army have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

• Friendly Orks Infantry units’ ranged attacks have [Assault].
  • In your Shooting phase, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, friendly Orks Infantry units’ ranged attacks have [Sustained Hits 1].
text.de:
• Die Fernkampfattacken befreundeter Ork-Infanterie-Einheiten haben [Sturm].
  • In deiner Fernkampfphase haben die Fernkampfattacken befreundeter Ork-Infanterie-Einheiten, wenn der Waaagh für deine Armee aktiv ist, [Trefferhagel 1].
text.es:
• Los ataques a distancia de las unidades Infantería Orkos amigas tienen [Asalto].
  • En tu fase de disparo, si el ¡Waaagh! está activo para tu ejército, los ataques a distancia de las unidades Infantería Orkos amigas tienen [Golpes sostenidos 1].
text.fr:
• les attaques de tir des unités d’Infanterie Ork amies ont [Assaut].
  • À votre phase de Tir, si la Waaagh! est active pour votre armée, les attaques de tir des unités d’Infanterie Ork amies ont [Touches Soutenues 1].
text.it:
• Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità di Fanteria degli Orki amiche hanno [Assalto].
  • Nella tua fase di Tiro, se la Waaagh! è attiva per la tua armata, gli attacchi da tiro delle unità di Fanteria degli Orki amiche hanno [Scarica di Colpi 1].
text.ja:
• 味方オルク・インファントリー・ユニットの射撃攻撃は［アサルト］を持つ。
  • 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、自軍が『いくさだァァァア！』の効果を受けている場合、味方オルク・インファントリー・ユニットの射撃攻撃は［連続命中1］を持つ。
text.ko:
• 아군 오크 보병 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [기동 사격]을 부여합니다.
  • 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 군대에 와아아아!가 활성화되어 있다면, 아군 오크 보병 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [연타 1]을 부여합니다.
text.zh:
• 己方欧克蛮人步兵单位的远程攻击拥有[突击]。
  • 在己方射击阶段中，如果 Waaagh! 对己方军队生效，那么己方欧克蛮人步兵单位的远程攻击拥有[连击 1]。

text.en:
Each time a **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit (excluding **AIRCRAFT**) from your army Advances, it can use its turbo. If it does, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 24" but can only move in one straight line, and until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by those models have the **[ASSAULT]** ability and that unit cannot declare a charge.

**Designer’s Note:** *When a unit uses its turbo, the models in that unit cannot pivot, and they cannot make a move of two or more straight lines (e.g. to navigate around obstacles). That unit also cannot declare a charge, even if another rule would let it declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.*

At the start of your Command phase, in a turn in which you have not called a Waaagh!, if you have one or more **WARBOSS** models on the battlefield (or embarked within a **TRANSPORT** that is on the battlefield), you can call a Waaagh! for a second time this battle. When doing so, that second Waaagh! only counts as having been called for **WARBOSS**, **NOBZ** and **MEGANOBZ** units from your army.

Each time an attack targets a **BOYZ** unit from your army, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save against that attack. Each time an attack targets a **BOYZ** unit from your army that contains 10 or more models, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against that attack.

At the start of your Command phase, select one objective marker. Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is your loot objective.

Each time a model in an **ORKS INFANTRY, ORKS MOUNTED** or **ORKS WALKER** unit from your army makes an attack, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability if either or both of the following are true:


■ That model’s unit is within range of your loot objective.
■ That attack targets a unit within range of your loot objective.

• Friendly Battlewagon/Hunta Rig/Kill Rig units have Wagon.
  • Friendly Wagon units can re‑roll charge rolls.
  • When a friendly Wagon unit is selected to make an advance move, that unit can change advance rolls to a 6.
This detachment has the WAGONS tag and cannot be taken with another WAGONS detachment.
text.de:
• Befreundete Kampfpanza-/Jägakutsche-/Killakutsche-Einheiten haben Panza.
  • Befreundete Panza-Einheiten können Angriffswürfe wiederholen.
  • Wenn eine befreundete Panza-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrückenbewegung auszuführen, kann der Vorrückenwurf für jene Einheit zu einer 6 geändert werden.
Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Panza und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Panza gewählt werden.
text.es:
Las unidades Karro de Guerra/Kazaforkma/Plataforkma amigas tienen la clave Karro.
    • Las unidades Karro amigas pueden repetir las tiradas de carga.
    • Cuando una unidad Karro amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar, esa unidad puede cambiar el resultado de las tiradas de avanzar a un 6.
Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta KARROZ y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento KARROZ.
text.fr:
• Les unités de Chariot d’Guerre/Kariol’ Kichass’/Kariol’ Kitu amies ont le mot-clé Chariot.
  • Les unités de Chariot amies peuvent relancer les jets de charge.
  • Quand une unité de Chariot amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance, elle peut remplacer les jets d’avance par 6.
Ce détachement a l'étiquette Chariots et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de Chariots.
text.it:
• Le unità Karro da Guerra/Makkina da Kaccia/Makkina Azzazzina amiche hanno Karro.
  • Le unità Karro amiche possono ripetere i tiri per caricare.
  • Quando un’unità Karro amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata, può cambiare i tiri per avanzare in 6.
Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Karri e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Karri.
text.ja:
• 味方バトルワゴン/ハンタリグ/キルリグ・ユニットはワゴンを持つ。
    • 味方ワゴン・ユニットは突撃ロールをリロールできる。
    • 味方ワゴン・ユニットが全力移動を宣言した時、そのユニットの全力移動ロールを6に変更できる。
    このデタッチメントはワゴンタグを持ち、他のワゴンタグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
• 아군 배틀왜건/헌타 릭/킬 릭 유닛에 왜건을 부여합니다.
  • 아군 왜건 유닛은 돌격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 아군 왜건 유닛이 급속 이동 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 그 유닛은 급속 이동 굴림 값을 6으로 변경할 수 있습니다.
이 디태치먼트에 왜건 태그가 부여되며 다른 왜건 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
• 己方战斗卡车/狩猎战车/杀戮战车单位拥有战车关键词。
  • 己方战车单位可以重掷冲锋掷骰。
  • 在一个己方战车单位被选择进行一次突进移动时，那个单位可以将突进掷骰的结果改为 6。
本分遣队拥有战车标签，并且不能与另一个拥有战车标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

target.en: One **ORKS VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Ork crews delight in engaging enemy vehicles and monsters in mobile battles.

target.en: One **SPEED FREEKS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. While targeting a unit within 9", they have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability instead.

restrictions.en: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Blitza Fire Stratagem in the same phase.

fluff.en: Often all an enemy will see of a Kult of Speed is a blur as they speed by, all guns blazing.

target.en: One **SPEED FREEKS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability and, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 9", a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

restrictions.en: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Dakkastorm Stratagem in the same phase.

fluff.en: Fiercely gripping the trigger, with a manic grin as they close on their foes, Speed Freeks fire so many rounds that some just have to find a weak spot.

target.en: That **SPEED FREEKS** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **SPEED FREEKS** unit from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: When racing buggies and warbikes charge at full pelt, the power behind their crews’ assault is so great that they can smash through the enemy.

target.en: One **BEAST SNAGGA INFANTRY** or **BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack targets your unit, models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. In addition, if your unit has the **Infantry** keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability.

fluff.en: There is no hiding a Beast Snagga stampede, but the more agile amongst the hunters know how to evade the worst of an unsporting prey’s dakka.

target.en: One **BEAST SNAGGA** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. In addition, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets your Prey, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

fluff.en: Beast Snaggas have many tales of the times they took on the biggest prey, clobbering them with so many blows that what was left was a crumpled mass of broken hide and squished innards.

target.en: One **ORKS WALKER** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit and, if you chose to push it, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons and they have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability as well.

fluff.en: The krews of a Mek’s stompiest contraptions revel in ripping apart anything they can get their klaws on, heedless of the damage done to their own gubbinz.

target.en: One **MEK**, **ORKS WALKER** or **GROTS VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE**, add 1 to the Wound roll. If you chose to push it, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability as well.

fluff.en: Stashes of extra speshul ammo provided by the Meks are often expended on rival monstrosities.

target.en: One **ORKS WALKER** or **GROTS VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If you chose to push it, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability as well.

fluff.en: Orks have a tendency to hold the trigger down until their weapon stops firing, falls apart or misfires.

target.en: One **ORKS WALKER** or **GROTS VEHICLE** unit from your army (excluding **TITANIC** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: The Meks’ creations can afford to have all manner of useless junk blasted from them with little effect.

target.en: One **Orks** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: When Orks get stuck into the foe, the carnage is wonderful to behold, at least for all their mates.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army (excluding **GROTS**, **MONSTER** and **VEHICLE** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Even the lowliest Ork Boy has a toughened hide and a dense skull. While there yet remains the prospect of a git to give a good kicking, it takes a blow of truly phenomenal strength to even give the Ork pause.

target.en: One **MOB** unit from your army that contains 10 or more models and is not Below Half‑strength.

when.en: End of your Command phase.

effect.en: Select one friendly Battle‑shocked **ORKS INFANTRY** unit within 6" of that Mob unit. That **ORKS INFANTRY** unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

fluff.en: The more Orks that gather in one place the more the Waaagh! energy flows, and the more fearless they all become.

target.en: One **ORKS INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for your unit.

fluff.en: Even Orks can put on a surprising turn of speed when the promise of a good face‑to‑face fight is in the offing.

target.en: One **NOBZ** or **MEGANOBZ** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead.

fluff.en: Nobz load themselves with all manner of weapons in shows of wealth and influence, enabling them to smash the foe with a ceaseless barrage of attacks.

target.en: One **NOBZ** or **MEGANOBZ** unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.

effect.en: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if a Waaagh! is active for your unit, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

fluff.en: Furious with any snivelling gitz who attempt to back away from a good fight, Nobz will ruthlessly hack them apart as they turn to flee.

target.en: One **NOBZ** or **MEGANOBZ** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The sheer aggressive contempt advancing Nobz project, not to mention their thick skulls and ‘eavy armour, make them a terrifying prospect for foes desperately trying to gun them down.

target.en: One **BOYZ** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit contains 10 or more models, re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

fluff.en: Galvanised by the rest of their mates fighting around them, Orks will redouble their efforts to outdo each other.

target.en: One **BOYZ** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in your unit are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

fluff.en: In the massive fights that Orks enjoy, the only way to ensure a slice of the action is to bludgeon a path through the press to get a hand on the enemy.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: The Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of the loot objective, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Freebooterz waste no time getting violently stuck into anyone unwise enough to try to keep prized loot out of their grasping claws.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: Having cut their gold‑plated fangs storming aboard hostile warships, these Freebooterz are good at getting stuck straight into the enemy.

target.en: That destroyed **ORKS VEHICLE** unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after an **ORKS VEHICLE** unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move over enemy units (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) as if they were not there.

fluff.en: If their vehicle is on its last legs, any sensible Ork driver will aim its fiery remains into the nearest foe.

target.en: That **NOBZ** or **MEGANOBZ** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **NOBZ** or **MEGANOBZ** unit from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound for each 4+ instead.

fluff.en: When a thundering mob of hulking Ork Nobz stampedes into the foe, their crushing momentum is a lethal weapon by itself.

target.en: One **BOYZ** unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, add 1 to the Charge roll and, if your unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

fluff.en: Once a horde of Orks get a sight of the foe, nothing can stop them.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: So resilient is Ork physiology – and so slow are Orks on the uptake – even death can take time to register

target.en: One **ORKS INFANTRY** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly **TRANSPORT** it is able to embark within.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: If your **ORKS INFANTRY** unit is wholly within 6" of that **TRANSPORT**, it can embark within it.

fluff.en: With nothing left to blast or krump, these Orks scramble aboard their transport and thunder towards the next engagement.

target.en: One **BATTLEWAGON**, **KILL RIG** or **HUNTA RIG** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time a unit disembarks from your unit after your unit makes a Normal move, that disembarked unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

fluff.en: As Orkoid vehicles thunder into battle at high speed, hatches and ramps swing open, unleashing eager mobs into the thick of the fight.

target.en: One **BATTLEWAGON**, **KILL RIG** or **HUNTA RIG** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Select up to two other friendly **ORKS VEHICLE** or **ORKS MONSTER** units within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit and each unit you selected are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

fluff.en: Driving forward in loose formation, Ork vehicles smash into the foe, crushing fleeing enemies beneath tyres, steel tracks and Squig trotters.

target.en: One **BATTLEWAGON**, **KILL RIG** or **HUNTA RIG** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Ramshackle though they may appear, Ork vehicles are frighteningly resilient in their construction.

target.en: One **BATTLEWAGON**, **HUNTA RIG** or **KILL RIG** model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: One **ORKS INFANTRY** unit embarked within your model makes a **disembark move**, then makes a **surge move** of up to D6”.

fluff.en: Spilling from their damaged transport, enraged Orkoid infantry mobs surge towards their attackers.

target.en: One **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit is a **VEHICLE** unit with an unmodified Toughness characteristic of 8 or less, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save instead.

fluff.en: Speed Freeks are often just blurs of vehicular mayhem that prove difficult to land a blow on.

target.en: That **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit from your army ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within 9" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test and, when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

fluff.en: Speed Freeks live in their vehicles, so it’s no surprise to find small squigs lurking in some compartments. A few are vicious, and entertaining, enough to be worth lobbing into nearby enemies to cause anarchy.

target.en: One **SPEED FREEKS** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Sometimes new targets that emerge are just too juicy to ignore.

target.en: One **BEAST SNAGGA INFANTRY** or **BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED** unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.

effect.en: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Beast Snagga victims often make a break for it before the Orks have had their fill of fighting. With a roar, the Orks immediately give chase, or else lose interest and lunge after other potential trophies.

target.en: One **BEAST SNAGGA** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy unit.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: With a keen eye for tracking their prey, especially kunnin’ Beast Snaggas will circle round the hunt site to ambush the luckless gitz from another angle.

target.en: That **BEAST SNAGGA** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED** unit from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If that enemy unit is your Prey, roll three additional D6.

fluff.en: Smasha squigs are essentially battering rams on legs. Driven on by the squighogs piling in behind them, they plunge headlong into the foe, trampling one after the next.

target.en: One **BEAST SNAGGA** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is **eligible to charge** in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. In addition, you can re-roll **charge rolls** made for your unit. If you do, your unit must end that **charge move engaged** with your Prey.

fluff.en: When bigger prey is sighted, nothing can keep a mob of Beast Snaggas from it. A great hunting chant erupts, and lesser gitz are swiftly forgotten in the enthusiastic impetus to pile into a bigger challenge.

target.en: That **ORKS WALKER** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ORKS WALKER** unit from your army has been selected to Advance.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for your unit and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

fluff.en: By pushing their engines past any sane level, Ork combat walkers can build terrifying momentum.

target.en: One **GRETCHIN** unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move.

fluff.en: A Gretchin’s lot is often a wretched one, and the spiteful zoggers will take any chance to cause pain and mischief using sneaky traps before legging it.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back or Advanced (unless it used its turbo this turn).

fluff.en: Speed Freeks live for the thrill of high‑octane warfare, rarely letting their feet off the accelerator, even in the most furious fighting.

target.en: That **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after a Speed Freeks or Trukk unit from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding attacks made with Indirect Fire weapons). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in a **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

fluff.en: No self‑respecting Speed Freek stops to aim. Instead, they fire on the move, concentrating hails of dakka on their chosen targets.

target.en: One **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Your Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LANCE]** ability and, if your unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons.

fluff.en: Fitted with jagged ploughs, spiked tyres and steel bars, Ork vehicles are potent weapons in their own right.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Benefit of Cover.

fluff.en: Large formations of Ork vehicles throw up columns of dust and clouds of smoke. These combine to shroud and obscure them as they thunder across the battlefield.

target.en: **SPEED FREEKS** or **TRUKK** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: The wiliest Speed Freeks see no shame in running away, especially when they can always come back and have ’annuva go.

target.en: One **NOBZ** or **MEGANOBZ** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not shot or fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if a Waaagh! is active for your unit. On a 5+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can shoot or fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: With bone‑headed arrogance, Nobz will carry on killing before their deaths finally register.

target.en: One **NOBZ** or **MEGANOBZ** unit from your army that destroyed that enemy unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3". If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, it can move up to 6" instead.

fluff.en: As one enemy falls to the choppas of a battle‑hungry mob of Nobz, they immediately seek out more.

target.en: Two **BOYZ** units from your army that are within 6" of each other.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, while those two units are within 6" of each other, they both count as containing 10 or more models for the purpose of your Detachment rule, any Enhancements models from your army have and any Stratagems you use.

fluff.en: With volleys of wagers, threats, insults, dung and the occasional hurled rock, mobs of Orks bolster each other’s spirits in the most Orky ways possible.

target.en: One **BOYZ** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Return up to D3+2 destroyed models to your unit (excluding **CHARACTER** models).

fluff.en: Orks are drawn to conflict and constantly race into battle at the merest hint of violence.

target.en: One **BOYZ** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

fluff.en: Keeping Orks at arm’s length and pummelling them with as much firepower as possible is often the safest tactic for their victims. Unfortunately, it can also draw their attention and give them the urge to re‑educate the gitz in the joys of up‑close savagery.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army (excluding **GRETCHIN** units) that is within range of the loot objective.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en:
Until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle.

**Designer’s Note:** *This means that any abilities that are in effect while the Waaagh! is active for your army will be in effect for your unit.*

fluff.en: Few warriors in the galaxy fight with greater brutality than a Freebooter determined to hang onto his loot.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit targets an **INFANTRY** unit with a ranged weapon, that weapon has the **[BLAST]** ability.

fluff.en: Invented by some sadistic Bad Mek, these shrapnel‑packed rounds of kustom ammunition are excellent for scything down tight‑packed enemy infantry.

target.en: One **FLASH GITZ** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ANTI‑VEHICLE 4+]** ability.

fluff.en: Just because an enemy vehicle is still mobile and fighting doesn’t stop any suitably arrogant Flash Gitz from claiming it as their loot, especially when their snazzguns are more than capable of explosively backing up that claim.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that was within engagement range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase and is not within range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit falls back.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Freebooterz are unscrupulous pirates through and through, always on the look out for new looting opportunities and sometimes even willing to forgo a good punch up in favour of hauling away their riches.

target.en: One **ORKS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Torrent weapons) have the **[ANTI‑MONSTER 4+]** and **[ANTI‑VEHICLE 4+]** abilities.

fluff.en: Though the cost in teef is high, Mek‑crafted speshul ammunition always comes in handy when taking on big targets.

target.en: That <k>Kommandos/Stormboyz</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>コマンド/ストームボゥイ</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>蛮人特种兵/风暴小子</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Kommandos/Stormboyz unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Kommandos-/Düs’nspringa-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Orkomandoz/Zoldadoz de Azalto amiga se elija para realizar un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Kommandos/Chokboyz amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di Zabotatori/Razzaltatori amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方コマンド/ストームボゥイ・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 코만도스/스톰보이즈 유닛이 후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方蛮人特种兵/风暴小子单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no le impide a tu unidad ser apta para declarar cargas.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは突撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 그 이동에도 불구하고 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: Blood Axes feel no shame in retreating from a fight, particularly if the boss wants someone else duffed up.
fluff.de: Blood Axes schämen sich nicht dafür, aus einem Kampf zurückzufallen, vor allem, wenn der Boss ihnen befiehlt, jemand anderen zu verprügeln.
fluff.es: A los Hacha Zangrienta no les avergüenza retirarse de la refriega, especialmente si el jefe quiere que sean otros a quienes les partan la cara.
fluff.fr: Les Blood Axes n'ont aucun scrupule à quitter un combat, surtout si le boss veut tabasser quelqu'un d'autre.
fluff.it: Gli Zkuri Rotze non si vergognano a ritirarsi da uno scontro, in particolare se il kapo li manda a picchiare qualcun altro.
fluff.ja: ブラッドアックス氏族は真っ最中のケンカからズラかることをためらわない。特に、親分が倒したいと思っている相手が別の場所にいるとなれば、なおさらためらう理由がない。
fluff.ko: 블러드 액스는 싸움에서 후퇴하는 걸 조금도 부끄럽게 여기지 않는다. 더군다나 보스가 다른 녀석을 쥐어패길 원한다면 두말할 것도 없다.
fluff.zh: 血斧氏族的欧克蛮人在撤退时并不会感觉害臊，尤其是在头目想要攻击其他目标的时候。

name.de: Die da sin’ als Nächstes fällich

target.en: One friendly unengaged Boyz/Kommandos/Stormboyz unit that was engaged at the start of the phase.
target.de: Eine befreundete Boys-/Kommandos-/Düs’nspringa-Einheit, die nicht im Nahkampf ist und zu Beginn der Phase im Nahkampf war
target.es: 1 unidad Chikoz/Orkomandos/Zoldadoz de Azalto no trabada amiga que estuviera trabada al inicio de la fase.
target.fr: Une unité Boyz/Kommandos/Chokboyz amie non engagée qui était engagée au début de la phase.
target.it: Un’unità di Ragazzi/Zabotatori/Razzaltatori non ingaggiata amica che era ingaggiata all’inizio della fase.
target.ja: このフェイズの開始時に接敵状態であったが、現在は非接敵状態である味方ボゥイ/コマンド/ストームボゥイ・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 페이즈 시작 시 교전 상태였으나 지금은 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 보이즈/코만도스/스톰보이즈 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个不处于交战状态，但在阶段开始时处于交战状态的己方蛮人小子/蛮人特种兵/风暴小子单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
when.es: Al final de la fase de movimiento del oponente.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Mouvement adverse.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Movimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to 6".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu 6" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 6".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de 6" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo 6".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大6mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 6"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 6" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Seeing little value in pursuing fleeing foes, Blood Axe mobs turn their attention towards the next fight or press towards whatever cache of shiny gubbinz the boss desires.
fluff.de: Blood-Axe-Mobs erkennen wenig Wert in der Jagd auf fliegende Feinde und wenden ihre Aufmerksamkeit dem nächsten Kampf zu oder machen sich auf den Weg zu jeder Beute, auf die ihr Boss aus ist.
fluff.es: Poco interesados en los enemigos que huyen, las peñas Hacha Zangrienta vuelven su atención hacia la siguiente gresca o hacia algún alijo de kachivaches ke brillan para el jefe.
fluff.fr: Ne voyant pas l’intérêt de poursuivre des fuyards, les bandes de Blood Axes portent leur attention vers la baston suivante, ou se pressent là où se cachent les bidules kibrill’ que leur boss désire.
fluff.it: Non trovando utilità nell’inseguire i nemici in rotta, gli Zkuri Rotze rivolgono l’attenzione al prossimo scontro o si spingono verso i forzieri di koze luccikoze bramati dal kapo.
fluff.ja: 逃げ出した敵をわざわざ追うことになど、ブラッドアックス氏族のボゥイたちは関心がない。多少は手応えのありそうな次の獲物を見つけるか、親分の欲しがる“イケてるお宝”を掻っ攫いに行く方がよほど楽しめるし、実益も高いのだ。
fluff.ko: 도망가는 적을 쫓는 데 흥미가 없는 블러드 액스 무리는 다음 싸움을 향해 달려가는 걸 더 선호한다. 물론 보스가 원하는 반짝이는 잡동사니를 챙기는 것도 나쁘지 않다.
fluff.zh: 在发现追击逃跑的敌人毫无价值的时候，血斧氏族的暴徒将注意力转向了下一场战斗，或者前去占领头目想要的闪亮战利品。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Kommandos/Stormboyz unit.
target.fr: Une unité de Kommandos/Chokboyz amie non engagée unit.
target.ja: 非接敵状態の味方コマンド・ストームボゥイ・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个不处于交战状态的己方蛮人特种兵/风暴小子单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
when.de: Am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al final de la fase de combate del oponente.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您对手的近战阶段结束时。

effect.en: Place your unit in strategic reserves.
effect.de: Versetze deine Einheit in die strategische Reserve.
effect.es: Coloca tu unidad en la reserva estratégica.
effect.it: Colloca la tua unità nelle riserve strategiche.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置する。
effect.zh: 将您的单位放入战略预备队。

fluff.en: Utilising camouflage, cover or misdirection, these Orks slip away to prepare their next ambush, leaving their foes staring at thin air.
fluff.de: Diese Orks setzen Tarnung, Deckung und Irreführung ein, um sich fortzuschleichen und den nächsten Hinterhalt vorzubereiten, während ihre Feinde verdutzt zurückbleiben.
fluff.es: Usando camuflaje, cobertura y confusión, estos Orkos se escabullen para preparar su próxima emboscada, dejando a sus enemigos mirando al vacío.
fluff.fr: À l’aide de camouflage, du couvert ou de leurres, ces Orks s’éclipsent pour tendre une autre embuscade, en laissant l’ennemi dans le flou.
fluff.it: Grazie a camuffamenti, coperture o diversivi, questi Orki scivolano via non visti da sotto il naso dei nemici per preparare l’agguato successivo.
fluff.ja: 敵が上の空でいる間、これらのオルクたちは偽装や隠蔽、誤誘導などの細工を仕込み、次なる奇襲準備を整えて姿を隠す。
fluff.ko: 이 오크들은 위장, 엄폐물, 속임수를 총동원해 적의 시야에서 벗어나 다음 매복을 준비한다. 그동안 적은 하릴없이 눈만 부릅뜰 뿐이다.
fluff.zh: 通过利用迷彩、掩护和诱导，这些欧克蛮人悄悄溜走并准备进行下一场伏击，他们消失得无影无踪。

target.en: That <k>Orks Infantry</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>オルク・インファントリー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>欧克蛮人步兵</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Orks Infantry unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Ork-Infanterie-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Infantería Orkos amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Infanterie Ork amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Fanteria degli Orki amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方オルク・インファントリー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 오크 보병 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方欧克蛮人步兵单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks that target a unit within 9" have +1 AP.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen eine Einheit innerhalb von 9" haben +1 DS.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad a 9" o menos tienen +1 a FP.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité qui ciblent une unité à 9" ou moins ont +1 en PA.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità entro 9" hanno +1 VP.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は、攻撃対象のユニットが9mv以内に一部でも入っている場合、【貫】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격이 9" 내에 있는 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 그 공격에 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 该己方单位对位于其 9" 内的单位进行的远程攻击拥有 +1 AP。

fluff.en: Nothing helps a round punch through armour better than stuffing it full of extra propellant.
fluff.de: Nichts hilft einem Geschoss mehr, Rüstung zu durchdringen, als es mit ordentlich Treibladung vollzustopfen.
fluff.es: Nada ayuda más a una bala a atravesar armaduras que llenarla a rebosar de sustancias propulsoras.
fluff.fr: Rien n’augmente mieux la capacité de perforation d’un projectile qu’un surcroît de propulsif.
fluff.it: Non c’è niente che aiuti un proiettile ad attraversare un’armatura come riempirlo di propellente extra.
fluff.ja: 装甲を貫通させたいなら、弾丸に追加の推進剤をたっぷり詰め込むといい。
fluff.ko: 장갑 관통력을 높이고 싶으면 장약을 추가로 쑤셔넣으면 된다.
fluff.zh: 让子弹击穿装甲的最佳方法就是在里面装满额外的推进剂。

name.ja: その程度でダッカだと？

target.en: That <k>Orks Infantry</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>オルク・インファントリー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>欧克蛮人步兵</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly <k>Orks Infantry</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit auf eine befreundete <k>Ork</k>-<k>Infanterie</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que tomó como blanco una unidad <k>Infantería Orkos</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui a ciblé une unité d’<k>Infanterie Ork</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica che ha scelto come bersaglio un’unità di <k>Fanteria</k> degli <k>Orki</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>オルク・インファントリー</k>・ユニットを対象に射撃を実行した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>오크 보병</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 적 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位针对一个己方<k>欧克蛮人步兵</k>单位进行了射击后。

effect.en: Your unit shoots using snap shooting, but while doing so your unit can only target that enemy unit.
effect.de: Deine Einheit schießt mittels eiligem Beschuss, kann dabei aber nur jene feindliche Einheit als Ziel wählen.
effect.es: Tu unidad dispara mediante disparos repentinos, pero solo puede tomar como blanco esa unidad enemiga.
effect.fr: Votre unité tire en utilisant le tir au jugé, mais ce faisant elle peut seulement cibler cette unité ennemie.
effect.it: La tua unità tira usando tiro improvviso, ma mentre lo fa può avere come bersaglio solo quell’unità nemica.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは即応射撃で射撃する。ただしその自軍ユニットの射撃は、その敵ユニットのみを攻撃対象として選択できる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 스냅 샷을 사용해 사격을 수행합니다. 단, 이때 이 유닛은 그 적 유닛만 대상으로 지정할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位使用快速射击进行射击，但这样做时只能将那个敌方单位作为目标。

fluff.en: Gun‑crazed mobs of Orks take incoming fire as a primal challenge, one that must be answered with an even bigger show of dakka.
fluff.de: Die von Fernkampfwaffen besessenen Orkmobs sehen in Feindfeuer nicht weniger als eine dreiste Herausforderung, die mit noch mehr Dakka beantwortet werden muss.
fluff.es: Las peñas de Orkos locos por las armas se toman los disparos enemigos como un reto primitivo, que debe responderse con una mayor demostración de dakka.
fluff.fr: Les bandes d’Orks hérissés d’armes à feu, considèrent les tirs ennemis comme un défi devant être relevé avec encore plus de dakka.
fluff.it: Le krikke di Orki fanatici delle armi da tiro considerano il fuoco nemico una sfida a cui si deve rispondere con zmitragliate ancora più massicce.
fluff.ja: 銃器に熱をあげるオルクは、飛来する火力を真っ向からの挑戦と受け取る。さらにどデカいダッカを見せつけて、対抗しなければならないものなのだ。
fluff.ko: 총에 미친 오크 무리는 적의 사격을 원시적인 도전으로 받아들인다. 따라서 이 도전은 더 큰 다카로 응수해야 하는 것이다.
fluff.zh: 蛮人枪械狂们会把敌人的射击当作是一种原始的挑战信号，他们必须使用更加浩大的突突演示来进行回应。

name.ja: 長々とした制御不能なバースト射撃

target.en: That <k>Orks Infantry</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>オルク・インファントリー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>欧克蛮人步兵</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Orks Infantry unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Ork-Infanterie-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Infantería Orkos amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Infanterie Ork amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Fanteria degli Orki amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方オルク・インファントリー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 오크 보병 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方欧克蛮人步兵单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Ignores Cover]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>。

fluff.en: When facing off against sneaky gitz who like to lurk in cover, most Orks believe the most effective strategy is to fire off so many bullets and munitions that something is bound to hit the target.
fluff.de: Wenn sie heimlichtuerischen Gits gegenüberstehen, die sich in der Deckung herumdrücken, halten die meisten Orks es für die beste Taktik, so viele Kugeln zu verschießen, dass sie irgendwann zwangsläufig das Ziel treffen.
fluff.es: Al enfrentarse contra tipoz furtivoz a los que les gusta estar a cubierto, la mayoría de Orkos creen que la estrategia más efectiva es disparar tantas balas y municiones que algo acabará por acertar.
fluff.fr: Confrontés à des pleutres terrés à couvert, la plupart des Orks sont convaincus que la meilleure stratégie est de tirer une quantité telle de projectiles que l’un d’entre eux touchera forcément la cible.
fluff.it: Quando se la vedono con tizi furtivi che amano nascondersi, molti Orki credono che la strategia più efficace sia sparare così tante munizioni che qualcosa deve per forza colpire il bersaglio.
fluff.ja: 遮蔽に隠れるコソコソした連中と対峙した時、大抵のオルクが最も効果的な戦法だと考えるのは、とてつもない量の弾丸を撒き散らしてどれかが命中することに賭けるというものである。
fluff.ko: 엄폐물 뒤로 도사리길 좋아하는 약삭빠른 놈들을 상대할 때, 대부분의 오크에게 있어 가장 효과적인 전술이란 뭐 하나라도 명중할 때까지 총알과 탄약을 퍼붓는 것이다.
fluff.zh: 在面对躲藏于掩体之间的鬼祟小贼时，大部分欧克蛮人都认为最有效的对抗手段就是不断进行射击，这样一来总会有子弹可以命中目标。

target.en: That <k>Wagon</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ワゴン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Charge phase, when a friendly Wagon unit ends a charge move.
when.de: Deine Angriffsphase, nachdem eine befreundete Panza-Einheit eine Angriffsbewegung beendet
when.es: En tu fase de carga, cuando una unidad Karro amiga termina un movimiento de carga.
when.fr: À votre phase de Charge, quand une unité de Chariot amie finit un mouvement de charge.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Carica, quando un’unità Karro amica termina unmovimento di carica.
when.ja: 自軍の突撃フェイズ中、味方ワゴン・ユニットが突撃移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 돌격 페이즈, 아군 왜건 유닛이 돌격 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您的冲锋阶段中，当一个己方战车单位结束一次冲锋移动时。

effect.en: Each enemy unit engaged with your unit makes a battle‑shock roll, with -1 to that battle‑shock roll.
effect.de: Jede feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
effect.es: Cada unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad hace una tirada de acobardamiento con -1 a la tirada.
effect.fr: Chaque unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
effect.it: Ogni unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità effettua un tiro per i traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi.
effect.ja: その自軍のユニットと接敵状態である各敵ユニットはそれぞれ戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛마다 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 전투충격 굴림 값에 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 每个与该己方单位处于交战状态的敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且那次战斗震慑掷骰结果 -1。

fluff.en: Having several tons of metal covered in blood, rust and spikes bearing down on them can shake the resolve of the most stoic warriors.
fluff.de: Es kann der Entschlossenheit etwas abträglich sein, wenn ein tonnenschwerer und blutbespritzter Koloss aus Stahl auf dich zurollt.
fluff.es: Cuando ven que se les vienen encima toneladas de metal cubiertas de sangre, óxido y pinchos, hasta los guerreros más estoicos desfallecen.
fluff.fr: La perspective d’être percuté par plusieurs tonnes de métal maculé de sang peut ébranler même les guerriers les plus courageux.
fluff.it: Vedersi arrivare addosso svariate tonnellate di metallo, ruggine e spuntoni fa vacillare anche i guerrieri più risoluti.
fluff.ja: 血と錆び、そして棘に覆われた巨大な金属塊が襲い掛かってくる光景を目の当たりにすれば、いかに堅固な戦士と言えども心に揺らぎが生じるだろう。
fluff.ko: 가장 초연한 전사라고 할지라도 피와 녹, 대못으로 빼곡한 수 톤의 금속이 닥쳐들면 동요하기 마련이다.
fluff.zh: 数吨重遍布鲜血、锈迹与尖刺的金属巨物泰山压顶般袭来，足以动摇哪怕是最坚毅战士的意志。

target.en: That <k>Wagon</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ワゴン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Fight phase, when a friendly Wagon unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Panza-Einheit, die in diesem Zug eine Angriffsbewegung ausgeführt hat, zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de combate, cuando una unidad Karro amiga que ha hecho algún movimiento de carga en este turno se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À votre phase de Combat, quand une unité de Chariot amie qui a fait un mouvement de charge à ce tour est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Karro amica che ha effettuato un movimento di carica in questo turno viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 自軍側白兵フェイズ中、このターン中に突撃移動を行った味方ワゴン・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 이번 턴에 돌격 이동을 수행한 아군 왜건 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个在该回合中进行过冲锋移动的己方战车单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have <k>[Cleave 1]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Tajar 1]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont <k>[Abattage 1]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno <k>[Falciare 1]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［蹂躙1］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[劈砍 1]</k>。

fluff.en: Hitting the enemy lines at full speed results in a crushing impact and a good deal of indiscriminate spraying gore.
fluff.de: Wenn man mit voller Wucht in die feindlichen Linien kracht, ergibt das meist eine Menge wahlloses Blutvergießen.
fluff.es: Chocar contra las filas enemigas a toda velocidad resulta en un impacto aplastante y una verdadera lluvia de vísceras.
fluff.fr: Percuter les lignes ennemies à pleine vitesse engendre in impact fracassant et une belle effusion de sang sans discrimination.
fluff.it: Travolgendo le linee nemiche a tutta velocità si generano un impatto schiacciante e una grande quantità di schizzi di sangue indiscriminati.
fluff.ja: 敵の戦線に全速力で突撃することで、強烈な衝撃を引き起こし、血肉が四方八方に飛び散る惨禍を引き起こす。
fluff.ko: 전속력으로 질주하다 적진을 들이받으면 효과가 끝내줄 뿐 아니라 뜨거운 피도 무차별적으로 뿌릴 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 全速冲入敌阵将引发毁灭性的撞击，并伴随着血肉模糊的景象。

target.en: That <k>Battlewagon</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>バトルワゴン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Battlewagon unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Kampfpanza-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Karro de Guerra amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Chariot d’Guerre amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Karro da Guerra amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方バトルワゴン・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 배틀왜건 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方战斗堡垒单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks (excluding attacks made by weapons selected with Firing Deck) have [Rapid Fire X], where X is that attack’s A.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit (ausgenommen Attacken mit Waffen, die mittels Feuerplattform gewählt wurden) haben [Schnellfeuer X], wobei X dem Wert A jener Attacken entspricht.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad (salvo aquellos realizados con armas elegidas con Cubierta de disparo) tienen [Fuego rápido X], donde X es igual al A de ese ataque.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité (sauf celles faites avec des armes choisies avec Pont de Tir) ont [Tir Rapide X], où X est les A de cette attaque.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità (esclusi gli attacchi effettuati da armi scelte con Pedana di Tiro) hanno [Cadenza Rapida X], dove X è la caratteristica A di quegli attacchi.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃（射撃デッキによって選択された武器による攻撃を除く）は［ラピッドファイアX］を持つ。Xの数は、その攻撃の【数】に等しい。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격(갑판 사격으로 선택된 무기로 수행된 공격 제외)에 [속사 X]를 부여합니다. X는 그 공격의 공격입니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有[速射 X]（火力平台选择的武器进行的攻击除外），“X”为那次攻击的 A。

fluff.en: Rolling into the midst of the foe, this wagon unleashes a rippling fusillade of rapid-fire death and destruction.
fluff.de: Dieser Panza rollt mitten in den Feind und entfesselt einen unerbittlichen Schnellfeuerhagel aus Tod und Zerstörung.
fluff.es: Conuciendo hasta estar mitad del enemigo, este carro desata una lluvia de disparos implacables y mortales.
fluff.fr: Tout en roulant au beau milieu de l'ennemi, ce chariot déchaîne une grêle de mort et de destruction.
fluff.it: Portatosi in mezzo ai nemici, questo carro scatena una rovente bordata di morte e distruzione a cadenza rapida.
fluff.ja: このワゴンは敵の只中に突っ込むと、猛烈な射撃を行い死と破壊をばら撒き続ける。
fluff.ko: 적진 한가운데로 들이닥친 이 왜건은 폭우와 같은 일제사격으로 죽음과 파괴를 흩뿌린다.
fluff.zh: 这辆战车呼啸着冲入敌阵深处，随即倾泻出一波接一波的密集火力，播撒着疾风骤雨般的死亡与毁灭。

name.ja: 切り込み斜面（アップグレード）

description.en: Wagon unit only. When a unit embarked within this unit is selected to make a disembark move, that unit has +1 to charge rolls until the end of the turn.
description.de: Nur für eine Panza-Einheit. Wenn eine Einheit an Bord dieser Einheit gewählt wird, eine Ausstiegsbewegung auszuführen, hat jene Einheit bis zum Ende des Zugs +1 auf Angriffswürfe.
description.es: Solo unidad Karro. Cuando una unidad embarcada en este unidad se elige para hacer un movimiento de desembarco, esa unidad tiene +1 a las tiradas de carga hasta el final del turno.
description.fr: Unité de Chariot seulement. Quand une unité embarquée à bord de cette unité est choisie pour faire un mouvement de débarquement, l’unité choisie a +1 aux jets de charge jusqu’à la fin du tour.
description.it: Solo unità Karro. Quando un’unità imbarcata in questa unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di sbarco, quell’unità ha +1 ai tiri per caricare fino alla fine del turno.
description.ja: ワゴン・ユニットのみ。このユニットの乗車中のユニットが降車移動を宣言した時、そのターン終了時まで、そのユニットの突撃ロールは+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 왜건 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 탑승한 유닛이 하차 이동 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 턴이 종료될 때까지 그 유닛에 돌격 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限战车单位。当一个搭乘在该单位中的单位被选择进行脱离移动时，那个单位在回合结束前进行的冲锋掷骰结果增加 1 点。

description.en: INFANTRY WARBOSS model only (excluding MEGA ARMOUR models).This model has Infiltrators and Stealth.
description.de: Nur für ein INFANTERIE-WAAAGHOSS-Modell (ausgenommen MEGARÜSTUNG-Modelle). Dieses Modell hat Infiltratoren und Tarnung.
description.es: Solo miniatura KAUDILLO INFANTERÍA (excepto miniaturas MEGAARMADURA). Esta miniatura tiene Infiltradores y Sigilo.
description.fr: Figurine de Boss de Guerre (hormis les figurines en Méga-armure) seulement. Cette figurine a Infiltrateurs et Discrétion.
description.it: Solo modelli di KAPOGUERRA di FANTERIA (esclusi modelli con MEGARMATURA).Questo modello ha Infiltratori e Furtività.
description.ja: インファントリー・ウォーボス・兵のみ（メガアーマー・兵を除く）。この兵は浸透戦術と隠密能力を持つ。

description.en:
Orks Infantry unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have:
  • [Rapid Fire 1].
  • Or: If that attack already has [Rapid Fire], +1 to the value of that [Rapid Fire] (e.g. [Rapid Fire 1] becomes [Rapid Fire 2]).
description.de:
Nur für eine Ork-Infanterie-Einheit. Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben:
  • [Schnellfeuer 1].
  • Oder: Wenn jene Attacke bereits [Schnellfeuer] hat, +1 auf den Wert jenes [Schnellfeuers] (z. B. wird [Schnellfeuer 1] zu [Schnellfeuer 2]).
description.es:
Solo unidad Infantería Orkos. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen:
  • [Fuego rápido 1].
  • O: Si ese ataque ya tiene [Fuego rápido], +1 al valor de ese [Fuego rápido] (p. ej., [Fuego rápido 1] se convierte en [Fuego rápido 2]).
description.fr:
Unité d’Infanterie Ork seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont :
  • [Tir Rapide 1].
  • Ou : Si l’attaque a déjà [Tir Rapide], elle a +1 à la valeur de ce [Tir Rapide] (ex : [Tir Rapide 1] devient [Tir Rapide 2]).
description.it:
Solo unità di Fanteria degli Orki. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno:
  • [Cadenza Rapida 1].
  • Oppure: se quell’attacco ha già [Cadenza Rapida], +1 al valore di quella [Cadenza Rapida] (ad es. [Cadenza Rapida 1] diventa [Cadenza Rapida 2]).
description.ja:
オルク・インファントリー・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は：
  • ［ラピッドファイア1］を持つ。
  • または：その攻撃がすでに［ラピッドファイア］を持つ場合、その［ラピッドファイア］の値は+1の修正を受ける（例：［ラピッドファイア1］は［ラピッドファイア2］）となる。
description.ko:
오크 보병 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • [속사 1] 부여
  • 또는, 그 공격에 이미 [속사]가 부여되어 있다면, 그 [속사] 수치 +1(예: [속사 1]이 [속사 2]로 변경됨).
description.zh:

  • [速射 1]。
  • 或： 如果那些攻击已经拥有[速射]，那次[速射]值 +1（例如：[速射 1]变为[速射 2]）。

description.en:
Wagon unit only. While a Big Mek model is embarked within this unit:
  • This unit’s ranged attacks have [Ignores Cover].
  • If the Waaagh! is active for this unit, this unit’s ranged attacks have [Sustained Hits 1].
description.de:
Nur für eine Panza-Einheit. Solange sich ein Mekboss-Modell an Bord dieser Einheit befindet:
  • haben die Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit [Deckung ignorieren].
  • haben die Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit [Trefferhagel 1], wenn der Waaagh für sie aktiv ist ist.
description.es:
Solo unidad Karro. Mientras una miniatura Mekániko está embarcada en esta unidad:
  • Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen [Ignora cobertura].
  • Si el ¡Waaagh! está activo para esta unidad, sus ataques a distancia tienen [Golpes sostenidos 1].
description.fr:
Unité de Chariot seulement. Tant qu’une figurine de Gros Mek est embarquée à bord de cette unité :
  • Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont [Ignore le Couvert].
  • Si la Waaagh! est active pour cette unité, ses attaques de tir ont [Touches Soutenues 1].
description.it:
Solo unità Karro. Fintanto che un modello di Grande Mek è imbarcato in questa unità:
  • Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno Ignora la Copertura.
  • Se per questa unità è attiva la Waaagh!, i suoi attacchi da tiro hanno [Scarica di Colpi 1].
description.ja:
ワゴン・ユニットのみ。ビッグメク・兵がこのユニットに乗車している間：
  • このユニットの射撃攻撃は［遮蔽無効］を持つ。
  • このユニットに『いくさだァァァア！』が有効である場合、このユニットの射撃攻撃は［連続命中1］を持つ。
description.ko:
왜건 유닛 전용. 빅 멕 모델이 이 유닛에 탑승한 동안, 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [엄폐 무시]를 부여합니다.
  • 이 유닛에 와아아아!가 활성화되었다면, 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [연타 1]을 부여합니다.
description.zh:
仅限战车单位。当一个大技师模型搭乘该单位时：
  • 该单位的远程攻击拥有[无视掩体]。
  • 如果 Waaagh! 对该单位生效，该单位的远程攻击拥有[连击 1]。

description.en: Orks model only. When both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy up to three friendly Orks Infantry units. When doing so, you can set those units up in strategic reserves, regardless of how many units are already in strategic reserves.
description.de: Nur für ein Ork-Modell. Wenn beide Spieler ihre Armeen aufgestellt haben, kannst du bis zu drei befreundete Ork-Infanterie-Einheiten neu aufstellen. Wenn du dies tust, kannst du jene Einheiten in die strategische Reserve versetzen, unabhängig davon, wie viele Einheiten sich bereits in der strategischen Reserve befinden.
description.es: Solo miniatura Orkos. Cuando ambos jugadores hayan desplegado sus ejércitos, puedes redesplegar hasta 3 unidades Infantería Orkos amigas. Al hacerlo, puedes colocarlas en la reserva estratégica, independientemente de cuántas unidades ya estén ahí.
description.fr: Figurine d’Ork seulement. Une fois que les deux joueurs ont déployé leurs armées, vous pouvez redéployer trois unités d’Infanterie Ork amies maximum. Ce faisant, vous pouvez placer ces unités en réserve stratégique, quel que soit le nombre d’unités s’y trouvant déjà.
description.it: Solo modelli degli Orki. Dopo che entrambi i giocatori hanno dispiegato le proprie armate, puoi dispiegare nuovamente fino a tre unità di Fanteria degli Orki amiche. Quando lo fai, puoi schierare quelle unità nelle riserve strategiche, indipendentemente da quante unità si trovino già nelle riserve strategiche.
description.ja: オルク・兵のみ。双方のプレイヤーが自軍の初期配置を行った時、自軍は味方オルク・インファントリー・ユニットを最大3個まで再配置してもよい。再配置を行う際に、望むならば選択したユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置してもよい。これらのユニットは、自軍が戦略的予備戦力に配置可能なユニットの上限個数にかかわらず、戦略的予備戦力に配置可能。
description.ko: 오크 모델 전용. 양측이 각자의 군대를 배치한 다음, 플레이어는 최대 3개의 아군 오크 보병 유닛을 재배치할 수 있습니다. 이때 그 유닛은 전략 예비대에 이미 편성된 유닛의 수와 상관없이 전략 예비대에 넣을 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限欧克蛮人模型。当双方玩家部署完军队后，您可以重新部署最多 3 个欧克蛮人步兵单位。在这样做时，您可以将那些单位放入战略预备队，无论已经有多少单位位于战略预备队中。

description.en: **ORKS** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
**ORKS** model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.
**ORKS** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
**ORKS** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.
**BEASTBOSS ON SQUIGOSAUR** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

**BEAST SNAGGA** model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.
**BEAST SNAGGA** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

**BEASTBOSS ON SQUIGOSAUR** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

**DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

**ORKS INFANTRY** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a **TRANSPORT** after that **TRANSPORT** has made a Normal move, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.
**DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".
**ORKS** model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or a **TRANSPORT** the bearer is embarked within) is within 9" of one or more enemy units, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.
**MEK** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

**MEK** model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to the bearer, then roll one D6: on a 1‑2, that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test; on a 3‑4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5‑6, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

**MEK** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, when rolling to determine which ability that unit’s weapons gain from the Try Dat Button! Detachment rule, roll one additional D6: until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit gain both Button Effects generated by those rolls. If a duplicate Button Effect is rolled, it has no additional effect.
**MEK** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

**ORKS INFANTRY** model only. Each time the bearer fights, while resolving those attacks, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer’s unit contains 10 or more models, while resolving those attacks, add 3 to the Strength characteristic instead.

**ORKS INFANTRY** model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or is embarked within a **TRANSPORT** that is on the battlefield), roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the bearer’s unit contains 10 or more models: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

**ORKS INFANTRY** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for that unit. While that unit contains 10 or more models, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit as well.
**ORKS INFANTRY** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit always counts as containing 10 or more models for the purposes of your Detachment rule and any Stratagems you use.
**WARBOSS IN MEGA ARMOUR** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

**INFANTRY WARBOSS** model only. At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement range of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test, and when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.
**INFANTRY WARBOSS** model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

**INFANTRY WARBOSS** model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If that unit is Below Half‑strength, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

**WARBOSS** model only. Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **ORKS** unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and it is no longer Battle‑shocked.
**ORKS** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

**BIG MEK** or **PAINBOY** model only. At the start of the battle, roll one D3 and compare the result to the list below. Until the end of the battle, models in the bearer’s unit have that bioniks ability.

**1.  Bionik Legs:** Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this model.
**2.  Bionik Arms:** Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.
**3.  Bionik Bonce:** Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

**ORKS** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **ORKS INFANTRY** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
**DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE** model only. Each time the bearer uses its turbo, its unit can move horizontally through terrain features.

**MEK** model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by the selected Vehicle model have the **[RAPID FIRE 1]** ability.

**DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE** model only. Change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – burna weapon to 3D6, and change the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s killa jet – cutta weapon to 3.
**BIG MEK** model only. Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of the bearer’s ranged weapons by 1.
**ORKS INFANTRY CHARACTER** model only. Each time you make a Charge roll for the bearer’s unit, if that unit disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn, add 1 to the result.

**ORKS CHARACTER** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer’s unit (or any **TRANSPORT** it is embarked within) is on the battlefield, select up to three **ORKS VEHICLE** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
**MEK** model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls for the selected **VEHICLE** model’s unit.
**ORKS INFANTRY CHARACTER** model only. At the end of a phase in which the bearer’s unit disembarked from a **TRANSPORT**, if that unit is Battle‑shocked, it is no longer Battle‑shocked.

▪ This unit has a 5+ **InSv**.
▪ While the Waaagh! is active for this unit, this unit has +1 **T**.

This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **BOYZ**
■ **BREAKA BOYZ**
■ **BURNA BOYZ**
■ **FLASH GITZ**
■ **LOOTAS**
■ **NOBZ**
■ **TANKBUSTAS**

fluff.en: The tribe’s Waaagh! banner has an almost religious significance, its presence on the battlefield filling the Orks with the overwhelming need to storm headlong into the enemy. It is typically carried to war by a Bannernob, a particularly large and belligerent Ork who has doubtless brutalised his rivals to claim this honour.

However, all are rugged transport tanks with the capacity to bear a large number of angry Orks into battle while shrugging off the worst the enemy can throw at them.

fluff.en: Big, brutal, and belligerent, Beast Snagga Boyz are a force to be reckoned with. From the cannonball-like fist-shells of their thump guns, to the inescapable hooks of their choppas, Beast Snaggas excel in softening up their prey, dragging them down, then ripping them bodily to bits.

fluff.en: It takes a ferocious and foul‑tempered Ork to lead a stampede of Beast Snaggas. Beastbosses possess these qualities in abundance. Boasting cybork enhancements, wired‑in targetin’ squigs and an array of brutal combat weaponry, these roaring monsters can bring down even the largest prey one‑on‑one.

fluff.en: Beastbosses have the strength and violent temperament to subdue the most ferocious creatures. Squigosaurs, meanwhile, are single‑minded predators that can bite through adamantine and shrug off enemy fire as though they were armour‑plated. If a Beastboss wishes to ride one he must first beat it within an inch of its life to teach it respect, all without getting devoured in the process.

fluff.en: Big Meks build all sorts of powerful weapons and bizarre devices. They readily bring their favourites into battle to test ’em out, even building and wearing a bionik exoskeleton to help them wield as many as possible. So equipped, the Big Mek unleashes mechanical violence and blasts of energy, or wrenches open warp tunnels down which he and his followers pile into the fight.

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that unit must take a Battle-shock test.
Once per battle, after rolling to determine how many attacks the bearer’s shokk attack gun makes, you can re-roll that dice.

composition.en: **1 Big Mek with Shokk Attack Gun**

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** close combat weapon, shokk attack gun.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 grot assistant.

fluff.en: Big Meks are masters of insane but highly destructive weaponry. Amongst the strangest devices that some lug to battle is the shokk attack gun which opens a tunnel through the warp to its target, then launches screaming Snotlings down it. The ammunition rematerialise as a terror‑maddened, clawing, biting swarm. If this happens inside the target, the results are swift and horrific.

instruction.en: This model can be equipped with 1 grot assistant.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **BOYZ** ■ **BREAKA BOYZ** ■ **LOOTAS** ■ **MEK GUNZ** ■ **NOBZ** ■ **TANKBUSTAS**

description.en: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **FORTIFICATION**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
While a friendly **ORKS** unit is within 6" of this **FORTIFICATION**, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more **FORTIFICATIONS** from your army:

■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** big shoota; Gaze of Gork.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with up to 3 additional big shootas.

fluff.en: Having a Gargant’s severed head serve as a boss’ hut is not only a status symbol, but also provides a base of operations equipped with a remarkable array of Orky features – from the potent Gaze of Gork built into one eye to the kommanda’s shoutin’ pole that carries the boss’ bellowed commands far and wide.

instruction.en: This model can be equipped with up to 3 additional big shootas.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 11 **ORKS INFANTRY** models. Each **MEGA ARMOUR** or **JUMP PACK** model takes up the space of 2 models.

fluff.en: Second only to the tribe’s Warboss, Bigbosses spend their time ordering other Orks around and giving enemy champions and war leaders a good kicking. They are formidably tough, usually heavily armed, always completely merciless, and entirely capable of ripping a Space Marine limb from limb with their bare hands.

fluff.en: While not as shooty as a Dakkajet, each Blitza‑bommer lugs enormous boom bombs into battle under its wings. Dive‑bombing the enemy with reckless abandon, the Blitza‑bommer pilots detach their oversized payloads before – hopefully – pulling up and screaming skywards again while vast fireballs billow in their wake.
